final:
// // This module reads data into the memory on the rising edge of the clock
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory <= data_in;  // Write data to memory
        end
        data_out <= memory;      // Read data from memory
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module reads data into the memory on the rising edge of the clock
